soilPreparation.title: Conseils essentiels pour preparer le sol
soilPreparation.excerpt: Decouvrez les methodes professionnelles pour preparer votre sol avant la saison agricole et maximiser le rendement...
soilPreparation.author: Admin
points: Conseil: Choose the right tiller for your soil type.
Conseil: Remove weeds and leftover crop residue before planting.
Conseil: Maintain proper soil moisture before tilling.
Conseil: Use cultivators for better aeration and root growth.
Conseil: Break large soil clods before seed placement.
Conseil: Level the field to avoid waterlogging in low spots.
Conseil: Add compost or organic manure before final cultivation.
Conseil: Avoid working soil when it is too wet or sticky.
Conseil: Check soil pH and correct nutrient imbalance early.
Conseil: Prepare raised beds for vegetables and delicate crops.
Conseil: Keep tiller blades clean and sharp for uniform soil mixing.
Conseil: Use shallow cultivation around existing roots.
Conseil: Plan drainage channels before the rainy season.
Conseil: Rotate crops to maintain soil health.
Conseil: Do a final light pass before sowing for smooth seed beds.

powerTools.title: Entretenir vos outils motorises
powerTools.excerpt: Un guide complet pour nettoyer et entretenir vos outils industriels afin de prolonger leur duree de vie et leur securite...
powerTools.author: Expert agricole
points: Conseil: Clean tools after every use.
Conseil: Remove soil, dust, and crop residue from blades.
Conseil: Check engine oil before starting.
Conseil: Clean or replace air filters regularly.
Conseil: Tighten loose nuts, bolts, and screws.
Conseil: Sharpen blades when cutting performance decreases.
Conseil: Check fuel lines for leakage.
Conseil: Store tools in a dry and shaded place.
Conseil: Inspect power cables and switches.
Conseil: Use only recommended fuel or power source.
Conseil: Service the tool at regular intervals.

irrigation.title: Techniques modernes d irrigation
irrigation.excerpt: Explorez les systemes d irrigation economes en eau qui transforment l agriculture moderne en Inde...
irrigation.author: Editeur
points: Conseil: Use drip irrigation to save water in row crops.
Conseil: Maintain pumps and filters regularly.
Conseil: Choose quality hoses, pipes, and connectors.
Conseil: Monitor water pressure during irrigation.
Conseil: Install filters before drip lines to reduce clogging.
Conseil: Flush drip pipes at regular intervals.
Conseil: Use sprinklers for even coverage in open fields.
Conseil: Select pump capacity based on field size and head height.
Conseil: Repair leaks quickly to prevent water loss.
Conseil: Schedule irrigation early morning or evening.
Conseil: Group crops with similar water needs together.
Conseil: Use rain guns for larger field coverage.
Conseil: Check nozzles for blockage before every cycle.
Conseil: Protect pipes from direct damage during field operations.
Conseil: Track soil moisture before increasing watering time.
